calendar.matters:
Petition For Determination Of Existence Of Trust (Probate Code Sction 17200)
Off Calendar Mar-13-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number 288692 (Estate of Joseph Freitas, Jr.).

Appearances: M. Armon Cooper for the Fundacion Arthuro Lopez-Perez. Helen Milowe for James Reuben.

Ms. Milowe reported that the IRS would allow a $555,000.00 charitable dedcution from the sale of the neckalce and stated that the balance of $15,000.00 would remain in the estate for pending expenses. In addition, she stated that she did not have written consent from the Beneficiaries and that distribution would have to be done when the petition for final distribution was filed. Furthermore, Ms. Milowe stated that there may be a delay in closing the estate and requested an order from the Court allowing distribution of the $555,000.00 of which $225,000.00 had already been distributed. A proposed order was submitted. The Court took the matters under submission.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.

Petition For Determination Of Existence Of Trust (Probate Code Sction 17200)
Off Calendar Mar-03-2009 Continued To Mar-10-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Determination Of Existence Of Trust (Probate Code Sction 17200)

Petition For Determination Of Existence Of Trust (Probate Code Sction 17200)
Off Calendar Aug-12-2008 Continued To Nov-18-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case #288692 (Estate of Joseph Freitas Jr.).

Appearances: Helen Molowe for and with James Reuben (Executor). Armon Cooper for Fundacion Arthuro Lopez Perez ("FALP").

The parties presented oral argument to support their positions. The Court directed the Parties to meet outside and try to work out the matter. Upon returning to the Court, Ms. Milowe stated that they would be delivering the proceeds from the sale of the necklace to FALP except for the reserve. Ms. Milowe will prepare the order. The matter was continued to November 18, 2008 for status.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Petition For Determination Of Existence Of Trust (Probate Code Sction 17200)
Off Calendar Jul-22-2008 Continued To Aug-12-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
